source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 13: Artifacts and Alien Devices (pp.256-265 / PDF idx 255-264). Each artifact has description and mechanics.

Elder Sign.mechanics: Mythos creatures must pass a POW roll to approach

Mirror of Tarkhun Atep.mechanics: Costs 5 MP + 1 SAN per use; target must be known to user

Crux Ansata.mechanics: Costs 25 POW to create; grants 1D6 armor

Powder of Ibn-Ghazi.mechanics: 1 MP per dose; invisible things become visible for 1 round

Space Mead.mechanics: Drinking costs 1D3 SAN; grants 1 hour vacuum survival
